tasks.title: Remove logging of server auth token
tasks.description: Security: remove or redact tracing::info logging of the server auth token in start_server (crates/ragent-server/src/routes/mod.rs). Logging auth tokens exposes secrets. Replace with a non-sensitive message (e.g., "auth token configured"). Include unit test or integration test ensuring token is not logged to info.

tasks.title: Handle poisoned Mutex in rate limiter lock
tasks.description: Robustness: avoid unwrap_or_else on MutexGuard poisoned results in send_message rate limiter. Replace with proper error handling returning 500 if lock poisoned. File: crates/ragent-server/src/routes/mod.rs lines ~290-306. Include suggested fix patch.

tasks.title: Use constant-time comparison for auth token check
tasks.description: Correct auth middleware to use constant-time comparison for bearer tokens to mitigate timing attacks. Replace direct equality check with `constant_time_eq` from `subtle` crate or `ring::aead` equivalent. File: crates/ragent-server/src/routes/mod.rs around auth_middleware.
